mechanism: Fiscal consolidation reducing GDP growth below 1.0% converts the maturity wall from a manageable refinancing challenge into a solvency wall. At true leverage of 7.5-8.5x, debt service at 500bp+ OAS consumes 70-80% of actual cash EBITDA, and the Kalecki profit floor that kept defaults low collapses with the deficit.
regime_dependence: Activated when GDP growth falls below ~1.0% while high-yield maturities concentrate; most acute 2025-2027 window. Manageable at consensus 2.0-2.5% growth.
